headline: Kindle Energy Breaks Ground on Blackstone-Backed $1.2 Billion Natural Gas Power Generation Facility in West Virginia
summary: WEST VIRGINIA & NEW YORK, April 22, 2026--Kindle Energy today announced it has broken ground at Wolf Summit Energy ("Wolf Summit"), a previously announced fully contracted, 600-megawatt greenfield combined-cycle gas turbine ("CCGT") power generation facility in Harrison County, West Virginia backed by Blackstone (NYSE: BX), through funds affiliated with Blackstone Energy Transition Partners (collectively, "Blackstone Energy Transition Partners").

headline: 'Blackstone, KKR Move to Restructure $1.4 Billion Private Loan' - Bloomberg
Jersey Mike's Confidential IPO Filing Tests Blackstone's Consumer Exit Story
summary: Jersey Mike's has reportedly submitted a confidential filing for an IPO after Blackstone acquired a majority stake in the chain. This move surfaces as a fresh portfolio event for NYSE:BX, tied directly to its fast casual restaurant exposure. The IPO process introduces a new potential route for value realization within Blackstone's consumer focused holdings. For you as a Blackstone watcher, Jersey Mike's sits at the intersection of private equity ownership and the US fast casual segment...
